name: ai_review
description: Inline @AI code-review workflow for Claude Code. Drop @AI in any comment; agent answers in place. Companion skill cleans the trail when done.

plugins.name: codereview-skills
plugins.description: Five companion skills: codereview-inline (process @AI comments), codereview-clean (sweep the trail), commit-reply-review (snapshot dirty tree before the reply pass), diffity-resolve-traced and diffity-resolve-tree-traced (wrap nilbuild/diffity resolution flows and leave an @SEEN @AI:/@AI-reply: trail at every edit site).
